title: Output Tabs
text: Output Tabs Use the Output tabs to access general functionality that is not restricted to a specific editor, such as message and compiler output that can be used to identify problems with development objects. The Output tabs are always displayed in the main window of the Uniface IDE. They cannot be moved to the secondary window. How to To adjust the space occupied by the Output tabs, you can drag the top of the tab bar up or down. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
